title: Chrome River/Emburse Enterprise API or Extension/Integration
excerpt: I use Chrome River/Emburse Enterprise to track expenses. I have a Monday board that tracks the details and lists all of my expenses. That board has the purchase occurrence, the category for the purchase, etc. It would be…

posts.author: jgilmore (Jake)
posts.cookedHtml: I use Chrome River/Emburse Enterprise to track expenses. I have a Monday board that tracks the details and lists all of my expenses. That board has the purchase occurrence, the category for the purchase, etc. It would be great to have an API or extension in Monday to allow the two apps to communicate so that the expenses I track in Monday that go into Chrome river can balance. Having this extension or API allow either a new expense or an expense update communicate from Chrome River and to the Monday board would be beneficial.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Interesting, but to make monday apps as developers, we need some sense of whether other users want to use it or not. So I’ll be watching this post to see if others are interested in the app.

But if you’re interested in a 1-on-1 solution, feel free to DM me.
